functions.name: LlmProfileDialog
params:
{
  open,
  profile,
  busy,
  onClose,
  onSaved,
  onBusyChange,
}

callGraph.callee: (levels.length ? levels : CEFR_LEVELS.map((item) => ({ level: item, word_coverage: "", grammar_focus: "", input_type: "" }))).map

functions.name: CefrLevelSelect
params:
{
  value,
  onChange,
  label = "CEFR level",
  size = "small",
  sx,
  ...rest
}

functions.name: FeaturePanel
params:
{
  title,
  description,
  loading = false,
  error = null,
  onRetry,
  children,
}
